rationale: Section 49.001 is purely a definitions provision for terms used in the school finance chapter. It does not address homestead exemptions or property tax appraisal, so no direct conflict arises.
quote: "Local revenue level in excess of entitlement" means local revenue levels that exceed the levels provided by Section 48.257.
_note: No conflict. This section defines terms; downstream revenue-calulation provisions (e.g., §48.257) may need rulemaking updates, but §49.001 itself is unaffected.
